case_title: MELENDEZ, MARGARITA VS TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES GATEWAY FREIGHT SVC-

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELENDEZ, MARGARITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES   GATEWAY FREIGHT SVC- TERMS-DEFT WILL: 1. WAIVE PENALTY FOR CHANGE IN RETURN DATE 6/21/01 2. UPGRADE PLTF TO BUSINESS CLASS ON 6/21/01. 3. ALLOW PLTF ONE EXTRA PIECE OF LUGGAGE ON 6/21/01. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MELENDEZ, MARGARITA AS TO DEFENDANT TACA INTERNATIONAL AIRLINES   GATEWAY FREIGHT SVC- ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAILING TO GRUP TACA INTERNATIONAL RETURNED SIGNED.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT RETURNED TO COURT: UNABLE TO DELIVER WITHOUT P.O. BOX.
